examples.title: Algorithm: Percept-Based Knowledge Update
examples.description: Updates agent's knowledge base using stench/breeze percepts to mark dangers
examples.code:
ALGORITHM UpdateKnowledgeBase(current_cell, percept)
BEGIN
 FOR each adjacent_cell IN GetAdjacentCells(current_cell):
 IF 'Stench' IN percept:
 KB.AddPossibleWumpus(adjacent_cell)
 IF 'Breeze' IN percept:
 KB.AddPossiblePit(adjacent_cell)
 IF 'Stench' NOT IN percept:
 KB.MarkWumpusFree(adjacent_cell)
 IF 'Breeze' NOT IN percept:
 KB.MarkPitFree(adjacent_cell)
END
examples.explanation:
Lines 3-4: Add possible dangers based on percepts
Lines 5-8: Eliminate dangers when percepts are absent
Uses Manhattan adjacency for 4x4 grid

examples.title: Algorithm: A* Pathfinding with Manhattan Heuristic
examples.description: Finds optimal path from start to gold while avoiding hazards
examples.code:
ALGORITHM AStarSearch(start, goal, safe_cells)
BEGIN
 OPEN = PriorityQueue()
 OPEN.Insert(start, 0)
 PARENT = {}
 G_SCORE = {cell: ∞ for all cells}
 G_SCORE[start] = 0
 
 WHILE NOT OPEN.Empty():
 current = OPEN.ExtractMin()
 
 IF current == goal:
 RETURN ReconstructPath(PARENT, current)
 
 FOR neighbor IN GetAdjacentSafeCells(current, safe_cells):
 tentative_g = G_SCORE[current] + 1
 IF tentative_g < G_SCORE[neighbor]:
 PARENT[neighbor] = current
 G_SCORE[neighbor] = tentative_g
 f_score = tentative_g + ManhattanDistance(neighbor, goal)
 OPEN.Insert(neighbor, f_score)
 
 RETURN 'No path found'
END
examples.explanation:
Lines 6-7: Goal check
Lines 9-14: Neighbor expansion with path cost
ManhattanDistance() serves as admissible heuristic
Maintains safe_cells list from knowledge base

examples.title: Algorithm: Logical Safety Inference
examples.description: Deduces safe cells using propositional logic rules
examples.code:
ALGORITHM InferSafeCells(knowledge_base)
BEGIN
 FOR each cell IN knowledge_base:
 IF NOT cell.breeze:
 FOR adjacent IN GetAdjacentCells(cell):
 knowledge_base.MarkPitFree(adjacent)
 IF NOT cell.stench:
 FOR adjacent IN GetAdjacentCells(cell):
 knowledge_base.MarkWumpusFree(adjacent)
 
 # Apply resolution rule
 IF cell.safe AND cell.visited:
 FOR adjacent IN GetAdjacentCells(cell):
 knowledge_base.MarkSafe(adjacent)
END
examples.explanation:
Lines 3-5: No breeze ⇒ adjacent pits impossible
Lines 6-8: No stench ⇒ adjacent Wumpus impossible
Lines 10-11: Propagate safety from visited cells
Uses modus tollens and resolution inference rules
